name: Caprese Salad
tagline: Tomato, mozzarella, basil, salt, oil — Capri's three-color flag
highlight: Five ingredients, ten minutes, peak-summer perfect

hero.alt: Caprese salad layered with tomato, mozzarella, and basil
hero.caption: caprese — tomato, mozz, basil

healthFacts: Combining tomato (lycopene) with olive oil increases absorption up to 4×.
Fresh mozzarella has half the sodium of feta or aged cheeses.

steps.title: Slice everything thick
steps.detail: Slice tomatoes 1/2-inch thick. Slice mozzarella the same. Pat both dry on paper towels — water dilutes the dressing.
steps.tip: Use a serrated knife on tomato — it slices clean instead of crushing.

steps.title: Shingle on plate
steps.detail: Alternate tomato and mozzarella slices on a platter, slightly overlapping. Tuck whole basil leaves between.
steps.tip: A long oval platter looks restaurant-perfect — round plates crowd quickly.

steps.title: Dress and season
steps.detail: Drizzle olive oil from a height. Shower with flaky salt, then black pepper.
steps.tip: No balsamic — that's an American addition. Real caprese is just oil and salt.

steps.title: Rest 5 minutes
steps.detail: Let it sit 5 minutes — tomato juices and oil emulsify into a juice you'll mop up with bread.
steps.tip: That platter juice is the best part. Have bread ready.
